year.note: training data covers 1991-2024; beyond that is extrapolation

elevation_m.note: training data covers 88-155m; wider bound left for other Brda vineyards

raw_feature_defaults_source: median of each column on the training split (analysis/notebooks/02_preprocessing_features.ipynb split, random_state=42). Used at inference time until Open-Meteo integration supplies real weather. growing_degree_days is included even though it was dropped from the model's own feature list by the Phase 2 correlation filter, because engineer_features() still needs it as an input to derive rainfall_efficiency and gdd_per_sunshine_hour.

climate_risk_thresholds.source: 25th/75th percentile of the training split; used by the backend's rule-based (non-ML) climate risk heuristic, not the trained models.

harvest_doy_by_category.source: mean harvest_doy per harvest_category on the full dataset (analysis/notebooks/01_eda.ipynb section 3). Used to convert a predicted category into an approximate calendar date for the requested year -- a real statistic, not a per-vineyard forecast.
